This page is the Bridge for the core specification family: a generated coverage index that names, for every chapter below, the skills that implement it. An empty list is an honest signal that nothing has been built against that chapter yet. The mapping is derived from the skill-to-spec map and kept truthful by the resolving coverage lint.
